title: stelis profusa
intro: Stelis profusa is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis profusa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
